name: Existing Neobank Modernization
phases: Mirror current payout corridors and ledger events in a sandbox.
Route 5% of stablecoin settlement through OMS with full reconciliation.
Expand to priority corridors and replace point wallet/stablecoin APIs.
Move treasury policy and incident controls into the OMS operating model.

name: PSP Stablecoin Settlement
phases: Add stablecoin settlement as an opt-in merchant settlement method.
Settle internally in USDC while merchants receive local fiat.
Automate treasury movement, reconciliation, and exception queues.
Use corridor-level economics to expand merchants by region.

name: Payroll Global Payouts
phases: Model contractor corridors and payout failure rates.
Launch stablecoin treasury settlement with local payout endpoints.
Add wallet-based emergency payouts and instant contractor withdrawals.
Consolidate reconciliation and compliance evidence for every run.
